title: IVT Aliquots
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs custom IVT aliquoting for up to 24 reactions in 2ml Eppendorf tubes. For liquid layout, please reference the liquid setup section of your protocol in the Opentrons App.
steps_raw: This protocol performs custom IVT aliquoting for up to 24 reactions in 2ml Eppendorf tubes. For liquid layout, please reference the liquid setup section of your protocol in the Opentrons App.
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
materials_raw: Opentrons 15 Tube Rack with Eppendorf 5 mL
Opentrons 24 Tube Rack with Eppendorf 2 mL Safe-Lock Snapcap
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
